amendments.reason: CI scope-guard requires vitest-ci-lanes.config.json to classify the two new test files into a lane; scripts/reachability-purge.manifest.json added because a new tracked file necessarily changes the whole-repo reachability graph scripts/reachability-purge.test.ts snapshots, and pack review reads this iteration (833.orchestrator-pack-129.json) rather than the superseding chain (833.orchestrator-pack-129-v2.json / -v3.json, which already declared this path and were independently confirmed correct against scripts/pr-scope-check.ts's resolveLatestCommittedSnapshot). This entry was appended to the existing single amendment record -- not a second amendment -- because plugins/_shared/lib/declaration_schema.ts caps amendments at one per iteration and the CLI's --amend already rejects a second call.
